title: Corrupted SMP Texture Pack
description: The official texture pack for the corrupted smp plugin
body:
Adds 12 Textures
- Fire Corruption
- Ender Corruption
- Clown Corruption
- Darkness Corruption
- Breeze Corruption
- Velocity Corruption
- Invincibility Corruption
- Ocean Corruption
- Health Corruption
- Heavy Blade
- Heavy Dagger
- Heavy Mace
